nodes.label: /** Backend base URL for dev proxy. Use 127.0.0.1 to avoid Windows IPv6 localhost mismatches. */
// Always load .env from this package (frontend/), not process.cwd() — avoids wrong/missing
// VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET when `vite` is started from the repo root.
// Long timeouts: slow Supabase + ML-heavy backend; avoids premature proxy aborts.
// ECONNRESET still happens if uvicorn --reload restarts the worker (close dev backend reload).
